reference: I was fooling around with my boyfriend on 23rd February. We were naked, but there was no penetration at all. There was no ejaculation either, but some pre-ejaculate might have been present. It was not around the vagina, though. I was due for my period on 2nd March, and I am now eight days late. I took a home pregnancy test on the 6th day after my missed period, and it was negative. I have no other symptoms. I'm really stressed. My period last month was also delayed by five days. I have been on medication for hypothyroidism for the past one and a half years. I am also overweight. Please tell me what the chances are that I am pregnant, or is the stress keeping it away?
text: I was fooling around with my boyfriend on 23 February. We were naked, but there was no penetration at all. There was no ejaculation either, but some pre-ejaculate might have been present. It was not around the vagina, though. I was due for my period on 2 March, and I am now 8 days late. I took a home pregnancy test on the 6th day after my missed period, and it was negative. I have no other symptoms. I am really stressed. My period last month was also delayed by 5 days. I have been on medication for hypothyroidism for the past 1.5 years. I am also overweight. Please tell me what the chances are that I am pregnant, or is this stress keeping it away.
